name: game-asset-forge
description: GameAsset Forge — 多智能体协作的游戏素材生成平台（兼容多种图像/LLM 模型，提供 Web 界面）

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @gaf/server" "npm run dev -w @gaf/web"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck -w @gaf/server && npm run build -w @gaf/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
